questions.question: What is the name of the parent organization of SLATEFALL?

questions.question: What is the metahuman classification of Lt. Solène Bauer-Cortez?
questions.explanation: Lt. Solène Bauer-Cortez has a metahuman classification of Class C-1 (Electromagnetic Sensing), which allows her to perceive EM emissions from 30 Hz to 6 GHz within 80 m.
questions.clarification: Correct answer: C. Lt. Solène Bauer-Cortez has a metahuman classification of Class C-1 (Electromagnetic Sensing), which allows her to perceive EM emissions from 30 Hz to 6 GHz within 80 m.

questions.question: What is the name of the Director-General of the Pan-American Metahuman Cooperative (PAMC)?
questions.explanation: The Director-General of the Pan-American Metahuman Cooperative (PAMC) is María-Elena Espósito-Tagle, who is serving a term from 2022 to 2027.

questions.question: What is the primary function of the Edificio Marasol base in Lima?

choices.A: Field office for Bolivian altiplano operations
choices.B: PAMC Headquarters where the asset rotates through quarterly for senior briefings

questions.explanation: The Edificio Marasol base in Lima serves as the PAMC Headquarters where the asset attends senior briefings on a quarterly basis.

questions.question: What is the status of the S-4 safehouse in Antofagasta, Antofagasta?
questions.explanation: The S-4 safehouse in Antofagasta was damaged but has been rebuilt and is currently active.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the micro-cache network maintained by the asset?

choices.B: To provide supply caches for operations
choices.C: To serve as communication relay points

questions.explanation: The micro-cache network is designed to provide the asset with supply caches containing essential items such as food, medical supplies, and communication equipment.

questions.question: What is the reason for the restriction on the Cerro Castillo exclusion ring?
questions.explanation: The Cerro Castillo exclusion ring is restricted due to psychological reasons, as recommended by the CBMP since 2020, following an incident in 2018.

questions.question: What is the nature of the agreement between the asset and the Bolivian Servicio de Operaciones Especiales (SOE)?

choices.A: Adversarial; the asset operates to counter SOE activities
choices.B: Bilateral cooperation framework for La Paz operations
choices.C: Competitive; the asset and SOE have overlapping objectives
choices.D: Hierarchical; the asset is subordinate to SOE in Bolivian operations

questions.explanation: The asset has a bilateral cooperation framework with the Bolivian Servicio de Operaciones Especiales (SOE), facilitating collaborative efforts in La Paz operations.

questions.question: What is the format for recording case files in PAMC?

choices.B: Case number (year-sequence), Date (start–end), Location (city, province, country), Classification (open / classified / declassified), Outcome
choices.C: Location (city, province, country), Date (start–end), Case number (year-sequence)
choices.D: Outcome, PAMC casualties, Adversary casualties, Post-action notes

questions.explanation: The PAMC format includes case number, date, location, classification, outcome, and other details as specified in section 9.1.

questions.question: What was the outcome of Case 2024-0202: Quebrantadero Showdown?
questions.explanation: The outcome of Case 2024-0202 was Catastrophic, with 11 civilian deaths and 27 civilian injuries.

questions.explanation: The outcome of Case 2025-0019 was Successful, with the audit reversed.
